note: TODDLER stage. Routine daycare notice (PD-day closure + bring-extra-clothes) from an enrolled provider — daycare_communication, a human relationship, not autonomous. Hand-derived from taxonomy: routine attendance/notice comms from an enrolled daycare map to daycare_communication, distinct from an enrolment offer (daycare_application_response).

input.rawContent:
From: toddlers@maplegrove-childcare.ca
Subject: Closed next Monday + reminders

Hi families! The centre is closed next Monday for a staff PD day. Please send Mia in with an extra set of weather-appropriate clothes now that we're heading outside more, and label her water bottle. Thanks! — Ms. Dani
